name: DTAN Server
compose:
name: slashnode-dtan-server
services:
  web:
    image: voidic/dtan-server:v0.2.0
    container_name: dtan-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      RUST_LOG: info
    volumes:
      - web_data-app:/app/data
      - web_data-config-config.yml:/app/config.yml
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8022:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-app:
    name: slashnode-dtan-server_web_data-app
  web_data-config-config.yml:
    name: slashnode-dtan-server_web_data-config-config.yml
